generated_oml:
instance CraneStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors on the lab-scale gantry crane capturing state data for movement and operational metrics"
]

instance CraneStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneStateSensor
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time state data of the gantry crane including position, velocity, and load measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneDataIngestionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based Physical Crane Interface and TimescaleDB for data ingestion and storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for logging and storing historical operational metrics of the gantry crane in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Access to historical operational data for analysis and validation of digital twin accuracy"
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization interface for monitoring gantry crane movements and state"

]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Live visualization of crane position, speed, and load for operational monitoring"
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for optimizing crane movement trajectories based on real-time data"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalControlAction
]

instance OptimalControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of crane movement parameters for optimal performance and safety"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Mechanism for continuous validation of digital twin alignment with physical crane system"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationInsight
]

instance ValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous verification of digital twin accuracy against physical system behavior"
]

instance GantryC4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C4 Model for architecture visualization of the gantry crane digital twin system"

]

instance C4ModelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

]

instance ArchitectureVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [

]

instance ArchitectureVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [

]

instance GitHubVersionControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

]

instance VersionControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for managing code and model versions via GitHub"
    DTDFVocab:provides VersionControlInsight
]

instance VersionControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Tracking of development history and changes in digital twin components"
]

instance AzureCloudEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Microsoft Azure tools for runtime visualization, simulation, and prediction in digital twin pipeline"

]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [

]

]

instance PredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Prediction of crane behavior under various conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictionInsight
]

instance PredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasted crane performance metrics based on historical data"
]

instance PhysicalCrane : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane structure and dedicated controller in laboratory research environment"
]

instance GantryCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Laboratory research environment housing the lab-scale gantry crane system for digital twin validation"
    base:contains PhysicalCrane, CraneStateSensor, CraneDataIngestionEnabler, HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeVisualizationService, OptimalControlService, ContinuousValidationService, GantryC4Model, C4ModelEnabler, ArchitectureVisualizationService, GitHubVersionControlEnabler, VersionControlService, AzureCloudEnabler, SimulationService, PredictionService

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands are issued by the Control Application (Python) through the Physical Crane Interface to execute movements on the Physical Crane. Specific command types, message formats, validation and authentication mechanisms, feedback systems, conflict resolution, and command execution confirmation details are not provided in the document."

    base:desc "Utilizes the C4 Model to visualize and describe the system architecture via context and container diagrams, detailing component interactions and structure."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Digital twin services communicate via an MQTT broker for signaling. TimescaleDB is used for data storage and Grafana for visualization. Network topology, bandwidth, latency, reliability, redundancy, and security protocols are not specified in the document."
